reachability_artifacts: cmd/sworn/board_test.go — TestBoardCLI_JSON runs sworn board --json against committed fixture

design_decisions.choice: Git operations via internal/git with new Show/CatFileExists methods — reuse the existing package with its Dir guard (S28) rather than spawning raw git
options: Raw os/exec git calls in oracle.go
design_decisions.rationale: The internal/git Dir guard protects against operating in the wrong worktree; new methods inherit it via r.run()

design_decisions.choice: Test strategy: real git repos in temp dirs with a thin contentReader interface for transient-retry test
options: Real git repos in t.TempDir() everywhere
Real git + contentReader interface for the one test that needs a fake
design_decisions.rationale: Existing internal/git test convention (real git init + commit in t.TempDir()) covers most tests; the contentReader interface handles the transient-read retry test's one-shot empty read per spec AC and Coach pin 4

design_decisions.choice: Docs prefix probe via git cat-file -e — ordered trial of docs/release/... then apps/docs/content/docs/release/...
design_decisions.rationale: Spec calls for one fallback; git cat-file -e checks the ref tree not the working tree, avoiding the Fumadocs symlink trap

design_decisions.choice: ReadBoard returns the full board struct; the CLI formats it — separation of concerns
design_decisions.rationale: Router (S58) can call ReadBoard later without pulling in CLI formatting

design_decisions.choice: Blocked owner inference: if verification.routing is absent, blocked → needs_planner, failed_verification → needs_implementer
design_decisions.rationale: Simple defaults, overridable when the verifier sets verification.routing
